behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all key strings: tui.heapsnapshot, server.heapsnapshot, snapshot RPC method, onSnapshot callback, file paths worker.ts/thread.ts/app.tsx, changelog.md path, section headers, and UPCOMING_CHANGELOG.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what should happen (RPC method, callback, prop) without specifying line numbers or exact code to write.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_app_accepts_onsnapshot_prop asserts the literal string 'onSnapshot={input.onSnapshot}' pattern, forcing the agent to pass the prop from input rather than via another valid mechanism; test_thread_implements_onsnapshot requires specifically client.call("snapshot", ...) syntax.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All f2p tests are string-matching checks (e.g., includes('writeHeapSnapshot'), includes('tui.heapsnapshot'), includes('onSnapshot={input.onSnapshot}')) — no test actually executes the snapshot command or calls the RPC.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test requires multiple distinct substrings that together can't be satisfied by a stub; implementing them essentially requires the behavior.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover worker snapshot RPC, thread onSnapshot, app prop wiring, and changelog restructure — all behaviors mentioned in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under section-header comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) with descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output; task produces code changes and a markdown file.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers in instruction match those in tests and solution script.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the relevant files (which are inherent to the task) but not exact lines or code snippets.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Not an agentmd-edits/config task; changelog.md is fully rewritten as part of the task requirement.
